overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European town with cobblestone streets, timber-framed buildings, and stone architecture. The character moves from an open town square through narrow alleys and archways into a bustling market district under an overcast sky.

events.description: character turns slightly right to avoid pedestrians in the square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the town square, passing villagers and approaching a stone tower

notable_agents.action: villager in green dress walking past the character
guard in red armor standing watch near the steps

entered.detail: octagonal wooden pavilion with red tiled roof in the town square
tall brick and stone tower with narrow windows attached to church building
traditional half-timbered houses with white plaster and dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a medieval town square with a prominent wooden gazebo and stone church tower. Geralt walks through cobblestone streets scattered with villagers, passing a guard in red armor while timber-framed buildings line the right side of the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between stone and timber buildings

events.description: enters a darker narrow alleyway with high stone walls on both sides
approaches a dark stone archway tunnel, light diminishes significantly

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through tight alleyways, passing guards and approaching a tunnel archway

notable_agents.action: guard in full plate armor with red helmet standing against the wall

entered.detail: dark stone tunnel with two arches leading to another district
parchment notice nailed to the stone wall with drawing and text

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alley with high stone walls. Geralt passes a stationary guard in red helmet armor while moving toward a dark stone archway tunnel. A wanted poster is visible on the right wall as the lighting becomes dimmer approaching the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered archway transition to market district

events.description: exits the dark archway tunnel into a brighter market district
emerges from shadow of tunnel back into diffused daylight

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the archway tunnel and emerging into a bustling market area with stalls

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead through the archway into the market

entered.detail: canvas awning covering merchant stall with goods underneath
wooden wagon with wheels parked on the side of the street
large stone gate structure visible at the end of the market street

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the dark stone archway tunnel, transitioning from the narrow alley into a semi-covered market district. The lighting shifts from shadow back to diffused daylight as market stalls with canvas awnings appear. A wooden cart sits on the right and a large town gate becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with merchant stalls and timber buildings

events.description: character turns right slightly to follow the curving cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the market district, passing stalls and villagers while approaching the town gate

notable_agents.action: merchant or villager standing near the market stall

entered.detail: canvas market tents with red and brown coverings set up along the street
curved stone steps leading up to a higher level on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a bustling market street lined with timber-framed buildings and medieval tents. The town gate grows larger in the center of the frame while stone stairs appear on the right. Market stalls and browsing villagers populate the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer town approach with gate entrance and grassy verges

events.description: approaches the large stone town gate entrance, space opens up

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the town gate, passing guards and villagers in the outer precinct

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: tall defensive tower with crenellations visible beyond the gate
grassy slope with stone retaining wall on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching the large stone town gate as the environment opens into a wider space. Medieval tents and timber buildings fall behind while a grassy embankment appears on the right. The character moves toward the dark gate entrance with a stone tower visible in the distance beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open medieval town square through a series of narrowing passages that eventually lead to a massive stone town gate. It begins in a wide square featuring a wooden gazebo and a stone church tower, moving past villagers and a guard in red armor along cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed buildings. As the path tightens, the scene shifts into a narrow alley with high stone walls and a wanted poster, where the lighting dims as the camera approaches a dark stone archway. The view then transitions through the tunnel into a semi-covered market district, where shadows give way to diffused daylight and canvas-topped stalls. Finally, the camera moves through the bustling market street and past stone stairs, leaving the timber buildings behind as the environment opens up toward a large stone gate and a distant tower.
